---
title: "Page 2 - Concept Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec07-sp02"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec07"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---

## Concept

_Add a clear explanation of the key idea, concept, or definition here._

## Example

_Provide an example to illustrate the concept._

## Why it matters

_Explain the importance or practical application of this concept._

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec07-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 1 - Overview Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec07-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Worked Example</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
